name: ClawMobile Companion
notes: Install this APK to use the native Android companion shell for ClawMobile.
Use the Social tab to create an Agent ID, add trusted contacts, exchange messages, and share compact skill knowledge.
Messages from unknown senders are filtered from the app UI by default.
Keep the Recovery Key private; it restores the same Agent ID on another device.
If an earlier debug-signed test APK is installed, uninstall it before installing this release-signed APK.
